summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of F-6 Mobile-First Sales feature. All 27 test cases passed (100% success rate). The mobile-first sales experience is fully functional with device-aware activation, role-based rendering, bottom-tab navigation, catalog/cart/checkout flows, orders management, and the 'Tampilan Desktop' escape-hatch toggle. Desktop regression confirmed: sales users on desktop viewport get the normal layout, and the old 'Mobile POS' menu item has been correctly removed from the sidebar. Sales-only activation verified: manager and admin roles on mobile viewport correctly receive the desktop layout, not the mobile shell.
passed_tests: Mobile activation: Sales role on mobile viewport (390x844) renders mobile shell with data-testid='mobile-sales-app'
Bottom tab bar rendered with 5 tabs (Beranda/Katalog/Keranjang/Pesanan/Lainnya)
Tab navigation: All tabs (home/catalog/cart/orders/more) switch content correctly
Home view: KPI cards, 'Buat Pesanan Baru' button, and mobile-sales-home component render
Catalog: Search functionality, category filters, product cards display
Add to cart: Cart badge appears/increments, sticky cart bar shows in catalog
Product detail sheet: Opens on product tap, shows details, add button works
Cart: Item list, quantity adjustment (plus/minus buttons), subtotal calculation
Checkout: Customer select, address select, payment term select, backorder checkbox
Order creation: Successfully creates order via POST /api/orders and navigates to Orders tab
Orders: List view, filter chips (all/active/done/cancelled), search functionality
Order detail: Expands on tap, shows line items and total
More menu: Profile card, menu items (CRM/Returns/Special/Pricelist) render
Sub-pages: CRM/Returns/Special/Pricelist open with back button navigation
'Tampilan Desktop' toggle: Switches to desktop layout, persists in localStorage 'kn_force_desktop'='1'
Desktop regression (1920x1080): Sales role gets desktop layout, NOT mobile shell
Sidebar verification: 'Mobile POS' menu item correctly removed (not present)
Sales-only activation: Manager role on mobile viewport gets desktop layout, NOT mobile shell
Sales-only activation: Admin role on mobile viewport gets desktop layout, NOT mobile shell
Device detection: window.matchMedia('(max-width: 768px)') works reactively
Role-based rendering: Only sales role gets mobile-first experience
All data-testid attributes present and functional for automated testing
Mobile UI: iOS-blue (#0058CC) color scheme, bottom tabs, cards, proper spacing
Real backend integration: Order creation hits /api/orders and succeeds
Empty states: Cart empty, orders empty states display correctly
Cart badge: Shows count on Keranjang tab when items present
Notification bell: Shows unread count badge in app bar
